title: Hyundai completes USDT treasury settlement pilot between US and Mexico
snippet: Hyundai completed a proof-of-concept using Tether's USDT to settle a cross-border treasury transfer between its US and Mexican subsidiaries, highlighting growing enterprise interest in stablecoin-based payments.

title: Japanese card network JCB partners Circle to explore stablecoins
snippet: JCB, Japan’s major card network, announced a tie up with stablecoin issuer Circle to explore a stablecoin collaboration. Initially it plans to explore two use cases. One is using stablecoins for JCB’s global treasury management, starting with a proof of concept for internal fund transfers. The other

title: Confirmo targets subscription economy with launch of stablecoin recurring payments
snippet: Confirmo, the stablecoin payment infrastructure provider, has announced Subscribe, enabling enterprise businesses to automate subscription and recurring payments in stablecoins alongside their existing payments stack.

title: JCB signs stablecoin MoU with Circle
snippet: JCB Co., Ltd. (Head Office: Minato-ku, Tokyo; Takayoshi Futae, Chairman and CEO; hereinafter "JCB") hereby announces that it has signed a memorandum of understanding (MOU) with an affiliate of Circle Internet Group, Inc. (“Circle”) (NYSE:CRCL), to explore collaboration utilizing stablecoins.

title: US banking groups urge Senate to strengthen stablecoin provisions in Clarity Act
